videoSnippet.title: A Short History Of The Candidates Tournament

Botvinnik, Mikhail Moisevich - Keres, Paul
FIDE World Chess Championship Tournament 1948 (Chess.com) [10] 2021.07.06
E28 Nimzo-Indian, Saemisch variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 Bb4 4.e3 O-O 5.a3 Bxc3+ 6.bxc3 Re8 7.Ne2 e5 8.Ng3 d6 9.Be2 Nbd7 10.O-O c5 11.f3 cxd4 12.cxd4 Nb6 13.Bb2 exd4 14.e4 Be6 15.Rc1 Re7 16.Qxd4 Qc7 17.c5 dxc5 18.Rxc5 Qf4 19.Bc1 Qb8 20.Rg5 Nbd7 21.Rxg7+ Kxg7 22.Nh5+ Kg6 23.Qe3

judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. Kh8 was best.
